title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: Pi is an agent framework that includes a harness layer for controlling agent behavior. The video compares Pi against other frontier coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and Antigravity, discussing how Pi's harness architecture handles increasing product complexity.
